processing.note: generated sheet had non-uniform row pitch (row3 helmet crest crossed the uniform 1/3 cut), so cells were extracted per connected alpha component instead of uniform grid slicing
steps: chroma key magenta via generate2dsprite.py remove_bg_magenta (threshold 100, edge 150)
connected-component detection on alpha>8: exactly 6 components
per-component crop +6px pad, shared scale to fit 128*0.92, center paste
defringe pass 1: r>g+40 && b>g+40 -> clamp r<=g+45, b<=g+25
defringe pass 2 (bronze rule): b>g+8 && r>g+8 -> clamp b<=g-4 (gold linework never has blue over green)
QC: 0 magenta-residual pixels (r>180 && b>180 && g<100) on all 6 cells

icon_semantics.tasks: quest scroll with tassel (dock right badge)

intended_use: world-map home bottom dock (MapCommandCanvasRenderer.renderMapCommandDock); the older hud-icon-*.png set stays untouched for other consumers
